message:
fix(cli): Implement --verbose and --quiet global options

- Add VerbosityLevel type to OutputFormatter (quiet/normal/verbose/debug)
- --verbose now shows [DEBUG] messages with:
  - Parsed command, flags, positional args
  - CWD and execution timing
- --quiet now suppresses [INFO] and [WARN], showing only:
  - [ERROR] messages
  - Direct result output
- Add printTrace() for debug-level trace output
- Export VerbosityLevel type

Global options now fully functional:
- ✅ -h, --help
- ✅ -V, --version
- ✅ -v, --verbose (shows debug output)
- ✅ -q, --quiet (suppresses info/warn)
- ✅ -c, --config
- ✅ -f, --format
- ✅ --no-color
- ✅ -i, --interactive (enables TTY prompts)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
